ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "op_carrier" TEXT /* Operating carrier of the flight */,
  "tail_num" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "dest" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "crs_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "crs_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "fl_date" TEXT /* Flight date */,
  "arr_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "crs_elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled elapsed time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles */,
  "distance_group" INTEGER /* Distance group of the flight */,
  "dep_del_15" INTEGER /* Indicator for a delay of 15 minutes or more */,
  "actual_dep_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time in the local timezone */,
  "actual_arr_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time in the local timezone */,
  "departure_status" TEXT /* Status of the departure (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "arrival_status" TEXT /* Status of the arrival (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a route table to standardize common routes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_tail_num FOREIGN KEY ("tail_num") REFERENCES aircrafts ("tail_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_op_carrier FOREIGN KEY ("op_carrier") REFERENCES carriers ("op_carrier"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest FOREIGN KEY ("dest") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., ABE, PGD) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code for the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "op_carrier" TEXT /* Operating carrier code (e.g., G4, MQ) */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the carrier */,
  "frequent_routes" TEXT /* JSON array of frequent routes operated by the carrier */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the carrier's fleet */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "tail_num" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "year_manufactured" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., commercial, cargo) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airport */,
  "fl_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "hourly_altimeter_setting" REAL /* Hourly altimeter setting */,
  "hourly_dew_point_temperature" INTEGER /* Hourly dew point temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "hourly_dry_bulb_temperature" INTEGER /* Hourly dry bulb temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "hourly_precipitation" REAL /* Hourly precipitation in inches */,
  "hourly_present_weather_type" TEXT /* Hourly present weather type */,
  "hourly_relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Hourly relative humidity in percentage */,
  "hourly_sky_conditions" TEXT /* Hourly sky conditions */,
  "hourly_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Hourly sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "hourly_station_pressure" REAL /* Hourly station pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "hourly_visibility" INTEGER /* Hourly visibility in miles */,
  "hourly_wet_bulb_temperature" INTEGER /* Hourly wet bulb temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "hourly_wind_direction" INTEGER /* Hourly wind direction in degrees */,
  "hourly_wind_speed" INTEGER /* Hourly wind speed in knots */,
  "hourly_wind_gust_speed" REAL /* Hourly wind gust speed in knots */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_celsius" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_chill" REAL /* Wind chill factor */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay (e.g., weather, air traffic) */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_category" TEXT /* Category of the delay (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay started */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delay record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delay record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "date_scheduled" TEXT /* Date the flight was scheduled */,
  "time_scheduled_dep_utc" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time in UTC */,
  "time_scheduled_arr_utc" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time in UTC */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., planned, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_actuals" (
  "actual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actual record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "date_actual" TEXT /* Date the flight actually departed or arrived */,
  "time_actual_dep_utc" TEXT /* Actual departure time in UTC */,
  "time_actual_arr_utc" TEXT /* Actual arrival time in UTC */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the actual flight (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actual record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_actuals_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_weather" (
  "flight_weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight weather record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "weather_id_departure" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions at the departure airport */,
  "weather_id_arrival" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions at the arrival airport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_weather_weather_id_departure FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id_departure") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_weather_weather_id_arrival FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id_arrival") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_weather_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airline staff, airport authority, weather analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay analysis record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delay */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the delay analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., weather, operational) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_analysis_delay_id FOREIGN KEY ("delay_id") REFERENCES flight_delays ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_analysis_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
